title: Sant Feliu de Llobregat Cathedral
summary: Sant Feliu de Llobregat Cathedral or the Cathedral of Saint Lawrence (Catalan: Catedral de Sant Feliu de Llobregat, Catedral de Sant Llorenç, Spanish: Catedral de San Feliú de Llobregat, Catedral de San Lorenzo) is a Roman Catholic cathedral in Sant Feliu de Llobregat, Catalonia, Spain. It is the seat of the Diocese of Sant Feliu de Llobregat.
text: Sant Feliu de Llobregat Cathedral or the Cathedral of Saint Lawrence (Catalan: Catedral de Sant Feliu de Llobregat, Catedral de Sant Llorenç, Spanish: Catedral de San Feliú de Llobregat, Catedral de San Lorenzo) is a Roman Catholic cathedral in Sant Feliu de Llobregat, Catalonia, Spain. It is the seat of the Diocese of Sant Feliu de Llobregat.
